artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a rusted, dented snack-vending cabinet half-swallowed by mutant overgrowth at the reservoir's edge, its compartments bulging with bloated, furred, sickly-glowing packages of long-expired food, murky green ooze dripping from the seams. Bruised stormy sky and rusted pipes haze behind it. Reverent low film-still angle isolating the toxic relic, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Expired Snack Cache
text:
When Expired Snack Cache enters the battlefield, it becomes a snack on the table.
{1}, Sacrifice Expired Snack Cache: Add {R}{G}. The fumes are flammable and faintly green.
flavorText: Best by a date that is now a rumor.
